SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-09-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS GGD INC. AND SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION'S AMENDED MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL, SET ONE, AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS ON PLAINTIFF IS OFF CALENDAR. ON SEPTEMBER 30, 2015, THE COURT ASSIGNED THIS MATTER TO ARBITRATION. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR KENNETH SAUL ATTERMAN.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO MAY-19-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIVALAN, DIEGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,000.00, . CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT GGD INC., IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIVALAN, DIEGO AS TO DEFENDANT SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION COMPANY GGD INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-29-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-24-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-06-2015

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-14-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE SEP-15-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION (TRANSACTION ID # 57873567) FILED BY DEFENDANT GGD INC. SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 57903499) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT GGD INC.

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GGD INC., SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION BY DEFENDANT GGD, INC. TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL, SET ONE, AND TO IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS ON PLAINTIFF IS OFF CALENDAR. ON SEPTEMBER 30, 2015, THE COURT ASSIGNED THIS MATTER TO ARBITRATION. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-19-2015.
ARBITRATOR DEAN ANTHONY ALPER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-20-2015 THROUGH FEB-18-2016.
ORDER EXTENDING DEADLINE FOR JUDICIAL ARBITRATION
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS GGD INC. AND SUMMITTEERS CONSTRUCTION'S Amended Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Responses To Form Interrogatories - General, Set One, And To Impose Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiff is off calendar. On September 30, 2015, the Court assigned this matter to arbitration. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Assigned To Arbitration On Nov-09-15

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Ggd, Inc. To Compel Discovery Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Responses To Form Interrogatories - General, Set One, And To Impose Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiff
